sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Ross Stores Q2 FY2025: 매출 전년 대비 성장, 관세 비용 0.11달러 반영에도 가이던스 소폭 초과

keyPoints.text: Q2 FY2025 EPS는 1.56달러(전년 동기 1.59달러), 순이익은 5억 800만 달러(전년 동기 5억 2,700만 달러)를 기록했으며, 관세 관련 비용이 EPS에 약 0.11달러의 부정적 영향을 미쳤다.
Q2 매출은 전년 동기 53억 달러 대비 증가했으며, 동일점포매출은 전년 대비 2% 성장했다.
관세 비용이 예상보다 낮아 EPS는 가이던스 상단을 소폭 초과했으나, 영업이익률은 관세 비용 영향으로 전년 대비 95포인트 하락한 11.5%를 기록했다.

riskChanges.text: Q3·Q4 관세 비용 영향은 각각 EPS 0.07~0.08달러 및 0.04~0.06달러로 예상돼 하반기에도 관세 부담이 지속될 전망이다.

businessChanges.text: Q2 월별 매출은 초반 강세, 중반 연화 후 분기 말 급반등하는 패턴을 보이며 하반기 사업 기조에 신중하지만 긍정적인 입장을 취했다.
Q2에 자사주 매입으로 2억 6,200만 달러를 집행했으며, FY2025 연간 10억 5,000만 달러 목표를 예정대로 완료하는 계획을 유지했다.

financialHighlights.text: FY2025 상반기 매출은 전년도 101억 달러에서 105억 달러로 증가했으며, 반기 EPS는 3.03달러(전년 동기 3.05달러)를 기록했다.
반기 순이익은 9억 8,700만 달러로 전년 동기 10억 달러 대비 소폭 감소했으나, 관세 비용을 감안하면 기대 수준에 부합했다.
Q3 EPS 가이던스는 1.31~1.37달러(전년 동기 1.48달러), Q4 EPS 가이던스는 1.74~1.81달러(전년 동기 1.79달러)로 제시됐다.

watchItems.text: 관세 부담이 FY2025 전반에 걸쳐 이익률을 압박하고 있으며, 관세 환경 변화가 하반기 실적의 핵심 변수다.
분기 말 매출 급반등 흐름과 하반기 동일점포매출 성장 가이던스의 달성 여부가 FY2025 연간 실적을 결정지을 핵심 모니터링 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q225exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 _______________________________________________________________ FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: Adam Orvos Connie Kao Executive Vice President, Group Vice President, Investor Relations Chief Financial Officer (925) 965-4668 (925) 965-4550 connie.kao@ros.com ROSS STORES REPORTS SECOND QUARTER EARNINGS PROVIDES SECOND HALF AND FISCAL 2025 GUIDANCE Dublin, California, August 21, 2025 -- Ross Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROST) today reported earnings per share for the 13 weeks ended August 2, 2025 of $1.56 on net income of $508 million. Included in this year’s second quarter earnings is an approximate $0.11 per share negative impact from tariff-related costs. These results compare to earnings per share of $1.59 on net income of $527 million for the 13 weeks ended  Normalized numeric aliases: $508 million = 5억 800만 달러; $527 million = 5억 2,700만 달러; $1.56 = 1.56달러; $508 = 508달러; $0.11 = 0.11달러; $1.59 = 1.59달러; $527 = 527달러; $5.5 = 5.5달러.

up from $5.3 billion for the same period in 2024, with comparable store sales up 2% versus last year. For the six months ended August 2, 2025, earnings per share were $3.03 on net income of $987 million. These results compare to earnings per share of $3.05 on net earnings of $1.0 billion in the first half of 2024. Sales for the first six months of 2025 grew to $10.5 billion, up from $10.1 billion in the prior year. Comparable store sales for the first half of 2025 were up 1%. Jim Conroy, Chief Executive Officer, commented, “We are encouraged by the sequential improvement in sales trends relative to the first quarter. During the second quarter, sales in May were strong and softened in June, before rebounding sharply in July. We  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.3 billion = 53억 달러; $987 million = 9억 8,700만 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; $10.5 billion = 105억 달러; $10.1 billion = 101억 달러; $5.3 = 5.3달러; $3.03 = 3.03달러; $987 = 987달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $3.05 = 3.05달러; $10.5 = 10.5달러; $10.1 = 10.1달러.

We ended the period with second quarter sales in line with our expectations, while earnings modestly exceeded the high end of our guidance range, mainly due to lower-than-expected tariff-related costs. Operating margin for the quarter decreased 95 basis points to 11.5% compared to the prior year, primarily reflecting tariff-related costs.” ROSS STORES, INC. 5130 Hacienda Drive, Dublin, CA 94568 (925) 965-4400 Update on Shareholder Payouts During the second quarter of fiscal 2025, a total of 1.9 million shares of common stock were repurchased for an aggregate price of $262 million under the Company’s two-year $2.1 billion authorization approved by its Board of Directors in March 2024. The Company remains on track to buy back a total of $1.05 billion in common stock during fiscal 2025  Normalized numeric aliases: 1.9 million = 190만 달러; $262 million = 2억 6,200만 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $1.05 billion = 10억 5,000만 달러; $262 = 262달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $1.05 = 1.05달러; 95 basis points = 95포인트.

by the tone of the business in the second quarter and feel we are well positioned as we begin the third quarter. However, given the uncertainty associated with the macroeconomic environment, we will maintain a somewhat cautious approach to planning our business for the balance of the year.” Mr. Conroy continued, “For both the third and fourth quarters, we are planning comparable store sales growth of up 2% to 3%. If the second half of 2025 performs in line with these sales projections, earnings per share for the third quarter are projected to be $1.31 to $1.37 versus $1.48 last year, and $1.74 to $1.81 for the fourth quarter compared to $1.79 in 2024. These guidance ranges include an approximate $0.07 to $0.08 and $0.04 to $0.06 per share cost impact from the announced tariffs for the third and  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.31 = 1.31달러; $1.37 = 1.37달러; $1.48 = 1.48달러; $1.74 = 1.74달러; $1.81 = 1.81달러; $1.79 = 1.79달러; $0.07 = 0.07달러; $0.08 = 0.08달러; $0.06 = 0.06달러; $0.04 = 0.04달러.
